queries.question: Provide films listed with sound design and also show films where John Williams composed the music score.
queries.sql:
SELECT Movie_Elements.movie_title 
FROM Movie_Elements JOIN Composer ON Movie_Elements.composer_id = Composer.id
WHERE Movie_Elements.element_type = "Sound Design" OR Movie_Elements.element_type = "Music Score" AND Composer.creator = "John Williams"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?movie_title WHERE {
  ?movie_elements a :Movie_Elements .
  ?composer a :Composer .
  ?movie_elements p:hasComposer ?composer .
  ?movie_elements p:movie_title ?movie_title .
  ?movie_elements p:element_type ?element_type_w .
  ?movie_elements p:element_type ?element_type_w2 .
  ?composer p:creator ?creator_w .
  FILTER((STR(?element_type_w) = "Sound Design" || (STR(?element_type_w2) = "Music Score" && STR(?creator_w) = "John Williams")))
}

queries.question: Which films are listed with sound design and music score composed by John Williams?
queries.sql:
SELECT Movie_Elements.movie_title 
FROM Movie_Elements JOIN Composer ON Movie_Elements.composer_id = Composer.id
WHERE (Movie_Elements.element_type = "Sound Design" OR Movie_Elements.element_type = "Music Score") AND Composer.creator = "John Williams"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?movie_title WHERE {
  ?movie_elements a :Movie_Elements .
  ?composer a :Composer .
  ?movie_elements p:hasComposer ?composer .
  ?movie_elements p:movie_title ?movie_title .
  ?movie_elements p:element_type ?element_type_w .
  ?movie_elements p:element_type ?element_type_w2 .
  ?composer p:creator ?creator_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?element_type_w) = "Sound Design" || STR(?element_type_w2) = "Music Score")) && STR(?creator_w) = "John Williams"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Which films are listed with sound design and music score composed by John Williams?
